title: anthropics/skills
summary: Anthropics 发布的公开仓库，专注于 Agent Skills（智能体技能）的收集与分享。该仓库旨在为 AI 代理提供可复用的技能模块，帮助开发者构建更强大的智能体应用。
summary_en: A public repository by Anthropics focusing on collecting and sharing Agent Skills, providing reusable skill modules for AI agents to help developers build more powerful agent applications.
